fields.description: Base URL of the Central instance, e.g. https://central.frappe.cloud
fields.label: URL

fields.description: API key of a privileged Central user. Atlas logs in to Central with this to register and report.
fields.label: API Key

fields.description: API secret paired with the Central user's key. Rotate by clearing via db.set_value, then re-saving.
fields.label: API Secret

fields.description: This Atlas's region, announced at Register. Defaults from site config atlas_do_region if left blank.
fields.label: Region

fields.description: Master switch. When off, VM lifecycle events are not reported to Central.
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: Central's id for this Atlas. Filled by Register.
fields.label: Atlas ID

fields.description: Last successful Fetch Sizes / Fetch Images.
fields.label: Last Sync

fields.description: Outcome of the most recent event delivery.
fields.label: Last Event Status

fields.description: The Central-managed WireGuard tunnel. Every field here is set by Central via provision_tunnel during registration — not hand-entered.
fields.label: Tunnel

fields.description: The tunnel CIDR (the hub peer's allowed-ips), e.g. 10.88.0.0/16.
fields.label: Tunnel CIDR

fields.description: The Central hub's WireGuard public key (the one peer).
fields.label: Hub Public Key

fields.description: The hub's public ip:port the spoke dials, e.g. 203.0.113.1:51820.
fields.label: Hub Endpoint

fields.description: This Atlas's own WireGuard public key, returned to Central so the hub can peer (read-back).
fields.label: WireGuard Public Key

fields.description: This Atlas's wg UDP listen port — the one port its public firewall accepts.
fields.label: WireGuard Listen Port

fields.description: Inactive → Provisioning (tunnel up, firewall armed) → Active (confirmed over the tunnel). Reverting when the auto-revert fired.
fields.label: Tunnel Status
